summary: Payroll Module testing completed. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in salary-structure API and Select.Item empty value bug in Employees.jsx. All 37 backend tests passed. All 7 Payroll pages load correctly. UI CRUD operations working.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error - insert_one adds _id to dict which wasn't being removed
Select.Item value='' causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop' error
fixed.fix: Changed empty string to 'none' value and updated form submission to handle 'none' -> null

action_items: Consider making sidebar scrollable or collapsible - HR/Payroll section is below viewport and requires scrolling to see
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar navigation is too long for 1080px viewport - HR/Payroll section not visible without scrolling
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test data with TEST_ prefix and cleanup ran at end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll module fully functional. All 7 pages accessible via routes: /departments, /employees, /salary-structure, /leave-management, /advances, /payroll, /payroll-reports. HR/Payroll section is in sidebar but requires scrolling to see.
test_flows_verified: Departments CRUD - Create, list, update departments working
Employees CRUD - All 4 types (permanent, casual, freelancer, contract) can be created via API and UI
Salary Structure - EPF/ETF rates, overtime rates, add/delete allowances working
Leave Management - Create leave request, approve/reject, view balances working
Advances & Loans - Issue advance/loan, track balance working
Payroll Processing - Create, submit, approve, process with journal entry creation working
Payroll Reports - Summary, EPF/ETF, Department reports working
